rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KATHRYN C. QVALE MARITAL TRUST DATED 1-31-2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition For Conveyance Of Property Belonging To Trust; For Damages And Other Relief For Financial Elder Abuse; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: The Court rules as follows regarding Bruce Qvale ("Bruce")'s demurrer to Miles Jeff Qvale ("Jeff")'s Petition for Conveyance of Property Belonging to Trust: (1) The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the First Claim for Relief for Conveyance of Property Based on Undue Influence. Jeff should amend his Petition to include information that is contained in his opposition brief (but omitted from the Petition), such as the date of the redemption agreement and parties to the agreement. (2) The demurrer is overruled as to the Second Claim for Financial Elder Abuse. The Court rules as follows regarding Bruce's demurrer to Jeff's Petition to Determine Validity of Exercise of Power of Appointment, etc.: (1) The demurrer is overruled as to the First Claim for Invalidity Based on Undue Influence. (2) The demurrer is overruled as to the Second Claim for Invalidity Based on Mistake. (3) The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the Third Claim for Intentional Interference with Expectation of Inheritance. (4) The demurrer is overruled as to the Fourth Claim for Financial Elder Abuse. Jeff's counsel should prepare the order in conformity with these tentative rulings. Should either side wish to argue the tentative rulings, please contact the court and opposing counsel no later than June 4, 2014, at 4:00 p.m.
